prompt: A photorealistic chemistry laboratory interior with glass beakers containing brightly colored liquids, chemical spill on the floor near a fume hood, yellow hazard warning signs, and shelves of labeled reagent bottles

A photorealistic industrial warehouse storing stacked drums of flammable solvents with red diamond-shaped GHS labels, a leaking barrel pooling liquid on concrete, and safety shower station on the wall
A photorealistic paint manufacturing facility interior with open vats of pigment, aerosol cans on a conveyor belt, ventilation ducts overhead, and flammable material placards on the walls
A photorealistic hospital storage room with biohazard waste bins, sharps containers on shelves, chemical disinfectant jugs, and radioactive material trefoil signs on a locked cabinet

A photorealistic auto repair garage interior with open containers of motor oil and antifreeze, a battery acid spill near a workbench, oxyacetylene welding tanks chained to the wall, and a parts-cleaning solvent tank
A photorealistic semiconductor cleanroom with hydrofluoric acid etch baths, nitrogen gas cylinders along the wall, corrosive chemical warning signs, and technicians in full protective suits

A photorealistic industrial kitchen interior with pressurized gas lines feeding commercial stoves, large containers of industrial degreasers under a sink, and a propane tank visible near the back entrance
A photorealistic building maintenance closet with shelves of bleach, ammonia, and concentrated cleaning agents, a mop bucket with mixed chemicals, and MSDS sheets posted on the door
A photorealistic pharmaceutical compounding room with powdered drug precursors in open trays, a ventilated weighing enclosure, cytotoxic waste bags, and spill-containment pallets on the floor

A photorealistic printing press facility interior with drums of solvent-based ink, isopropyl alcohol wash stations, ink-stained rags near a waste bin, and a flammable liquids storage cabinet with self-closing doors
